race.comment: Good race. FLYING CONCELLO (2) is in hot form winning three of four this campaign. Big winner here last time as favourite making it two wins from as many tries this circuit. Looks the measuring stick. ZUNI (7) ran on hard to score here last time and beat many of these. Little more weight but flying and drawn to stalk the lead off the inside. FLYING BILLIE (4) gave a sight over 1400m latest and held a placing. Tricky draw here but has good pace and can give a sight again. FURNEAUX (1) is worth keeping very safe. Goes well fresh and on record at course and distance looks a leading player. SANDUAL (6) ran on well here last time behind ZUNI and should be in the mix again.
